patch.value:
## Context
From memory notes:
- 'per-command cost is now ~entirely ESM module resolution (~90ms) → bundling (pm-ss1d, esbuild --splitting --packages=external) is the last lever'
- 'pm --version short-circuits before main.js so it’s a bad perf probe'
- 'create 2581→239ms, update 1693→265ms: non-blocking background semantic refresh + skip already-migrated items'

ARCHITECTURE.md has source tree, storage layout, mutation contract, but no performance section.

## Acceptance criteria
- ARCHITECTURE.md has a 'Performance characteristics' section covering:
  - Startup cost model: ~90ms from ESM module resolution; pm --version short-circuits cli.ts before main.ts
  - Mutation perf: non-blocking background semantic refresh (detached worker + reindex lock); migration skip for already-migrated items
  - Front-matter cache: body-split for list performance
  - Drift-scan verification cache: pm health bottleneck addressed
  - Known remaining levers (bundling note)

## Evidence
docs/ARCHITECTURE.md: no performance section; memory notes from sessions 2026-05-27 and 2026-05-31
Add performance / startup-latency section to ARCHITECTURE.md

ARCHITECTURE.md has no section on performance characteristics or startup latency. Sessions 2026-05-27 and 2026-05-31 delivered major perf improvements (front-matter cache body-split, drift-scan verification cache, non-blocking background semantic refresh, per-command code-splitting via detached handlers). Agents and contributors have no documented model of expected performance, what the remaining bottleneck is (~90ms from ESM module resolution), or how to profile startup cost.

- ARCHITECTURE.md has a 'Performance characteristics' section covering:
- Startup cost model: ~90ms from ESM module resolution; pm --version short-circuits cli.ts before main.ts
- Mutation perf: non-blocking background semantic refresh (detached worker + reindex lock); migration skip for already-migrated items
- Front-matter cache: body-split for list performance
- Drift-scan verification cache: pm health bottleneck addressed
- Known remaining levers (bundling note)
